description_long: This object is a compact electronic control cabinet with a rectangular body, featuring a light gray metal faceplate and wooden side panels. The front panel is equipped with four rotary knobs, several push buttons, and a digital display screen, all arranged for user interaction. The display is illuminated and shows text, while the knobs and buttons are labeled for various functions, suggesting use in audio or MIDI control. The cabinet has visible screws securing the panels and rubber feet on the bottom for stability. There is a decorative paisley pattern etched on the right side of the front panel, adding a unique visual element. The top and sides are plain, with the back showing additional ports and connectors for external devices.
description: A compact, rectangular control cabinet with a gray metal faceplate, wooden side panels, rotary knobs, buttons, and a digital display. Decorative etching and multiple ports enhance its functional and visual appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display, four rotary knobs, labeled buttons, and decorative paisley etching.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth wooden panel and the protruding knobs from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the bottom with rubber feet, screws, and various ports and connectors.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain wooden panel and a glimpse of the front controls.
